title: Hypothesis Generation Output
description: Output of the hypothesis-generator sub-agent for a single claim or query. Uses either a hypotheses approach (claim mode: approach=hypotheses, populates hypotheses + discriminating_questions) or an open-ended approach (query mode: approach=open-ended, populates rationale + search_themes). The approach field determines which optional fields are meaningful.

id.description: The claim or query ID this output corresponds to.

hypotheses.description: Competing hypotheses. Present when approach=hypotheses. Minimum three required.

discriminating_questions.description: Questions whose answers would distinguish between hypotheses. Present when approach=hypotheses.

rationale.description: Why hypotheses are not appropriate for this query. Present when approach=open-ended.

search_themes.description: Thematic search targets derived from sub-questions. Present when approach=open-ended.

axiom_constraints.description: How declared axioms constrain the hypothesis or search space.

statement.description: The hypothesis stated clearly in plain language.

supporting_evidence.description: Descriptions of evidence that would support this hypothesis.

eliminating_evidence.description: Descriptions of evidence that would eliminate this hypothesis.

depends_on_assumptions.description: Which surfaced assumptions this hypothesis relies on.

look_for.description: Specific things to look for in search results.
